texto: Whites and pastels — colors suitable for a girl’s come-out, though not always suited to the girls coming out — eddied erratically around gowns in every brilliant hue ladies married, widowed or on the shelf could imagine, and a few they ought not have.
explicacao: Citação de Colleen Ladd sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Whites and pastels — colors suitable for a girl’s come-out, though not always suited to the girls…” articula reflexao, historical-romance, whites em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
